columns.extraction_plan: The PDF does not report 'Time to PSA progression' (TTPSA) for the treatment arm. Table 2 (page 8) lists secondary efficacy endpoints such as 'Time to CRPC' and 'Time to pain progression', but not TTPSA. The 'Secondary Efficacy End Points' section on page 4 and 'Study Assessments' on page 3 also do not mention TTPSA.

The PDF does not report 'Time to PSA progression' (TTPSA) for the control arm. Table 2 (page 8) lists secondary efficacy endpoints such as 'Time to CRPC' and 'Time to pain progression', but not TTPSA. The 'Secondary Efficacy End Points' section on page 4 and 'Study Assessments' on page 3 also do not mention TTPSA.
